qry:select.name: DatosLiq
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, LIQ19.c_clase from liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19 WHERE liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: EGRESO
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa, PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult
from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, ORG18_categorias as ORG18 JOIN PER02.oi_categoria_ult INNER ORG18.oi_categoria, PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 4 and (liq07.l_liq_final = 0 or isnull(liq07.l_liq_final) or liq19.l_ajuste = 1)
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1) {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: HABERESMENSUAL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa, PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as PP JOIN
PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER PP.oi_tipo_personal WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq19.c_clase = \'M\' and PP.c_tipo_personal in (\'1\',\'4\',\'8\',\'3\') and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1) {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: HABERESQUINCENAL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa , PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as PP
JOIN
PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER PP.oi_tipo_personal
WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq19.c_clase = \'Q\' and PP.c_tipo_personal in (\'2\',\'5\') and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1)
{% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOEGRESONIHAB
RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT org03.c_empresa, liq19.c_liquidacion, org03.d_empresa, liq19.d_titulo FROM liq19_liquidacion as liq19, org03_empresas as org03 WHERE liq19.oi_liquidacion = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_Liquidacion %} AND liq19.oi_empresa = org03.oi_empresa ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT org03.c_empresa, liq19.c_liquidacion, org03.d_empresa, liq19.d_titulo FROM liq19_liquidacion as liq19, org03_empresas as org03 WHERE liq19.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@value %} AND liq19.oi_empresa = org03.oi_empresa ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as liq25 WHERE liq25.OI_LIQUIDACION = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <FILTRO oi_empresa="" c_estado="" oi_tipo_liq="" ATRIB_ORDEN1="" ORDEN1="" ATRIB_ORDEN2="" ORDEN2="" ATRIB_ORDEN3="" ORDEN3="" ATRIB_ORDEN4="" ORDEN4="" id_emp="2"><LIQUIDACIONES><LIQUIDACION id="181"/></LIQUIDACIONES><PERIODOS><PERIODO id="201902"/></PERIODOS><EMPRESAS><LIQUIDACION id="2"/></EMPRESAS></FILTRO>
qry:define.name: FILTER

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t19.oi_liquidacion, t19.c_liquidacion, t19.d_titulo, org03.c_empresa, t19.e_periodo, t19.f_liquidacion, SECLIQ.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t19, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SECLIQ, ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC JOIN t19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, org03.oi_empresa LEFT OUTER SEC.id, t19.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SECLIQ.id WHERE 1=1 and t19.l_simulacion = 0 {%? (string(#SOURCE:EMPRESAS/EMPRESA/@id)!='') {% and t19.oi_empresa in ({%=string(#SOURCE:EMPRESAS/EMPRESA/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@c_estado!='') {% and t19.c_estado= {#SOURCE:@c_estado} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_liq!='') {% and t19.oi_tipo_liq= {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_liq} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% AND t19.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:PERIODOS/PERIODO/@id)!='') {% AND t19.e_periodo in ({%=string(#SOURCE:PERIODOS/PERIODO/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY e_periodo ASC, f_liquidacion ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <FILTRO oi_empresa="" c_estado="I" oi_tipo_liq="" ATRIB_ORDEN1="c_empresa" ORDEN1="Asc" ATRIB_ORDEN2="" ORDEN2="" ATRIB_ORDEN3="" ORDEN3="" ATRIB_ORDEN4="" ORDEN4=""><LIQUIDACIONES /><PERIODOS /></FILTRO>
qry:define.name: LIST

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select t19.oi_liquidacion, t19.c_liquidacion, t19.d_titulo, t19.f_cierre, t19.e_quincena, t19.c_clase, t19.c_estado, t19.oi_tipo_liq, org03.c_empresa, org03.oi_empresa, t19.e_periodo, t19.l_ajuste, t19.f_liquidacion, t19.oi_liq_genero, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t19, ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, t19.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE 1=1 and t19.l_simulacion = 0 {%? (string(#SOURCE:EMPRESAS/EMPRESA/@id)!='') {% and t19.oi_empresa in ({%=string(#SOURCE:EMPRESAS/EMPRESA/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@c_estado!='') {% and t19.c_estado= {#SOURCE:@c_estado} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_liq!='') {% and t19.oi_tipo_liq= {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_liq} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% AND t19.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:PERIODOS/PERIODO/@id)!='') {% AND t19.e_periodo in ({%=string(#SOURCE:PERIODOS/PERIODO/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY e_periodo ASC, f_liquidacion ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql12
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT count(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq) as cant FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ16_ERRORES.d_error, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto, LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ.oi_error_liq
FROM LIQ16_ERRORES, LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS
JOIN LIQ16_ERRORES.oi_error INNER LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ.oi_error, LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia INNER LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.e_secuencia, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo
WHERE LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_ejecucion = {#SOURCE:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <DATOS c_clase="M" oi_tipo_liq="1" ID="43"> <ROWS> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11462"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11466"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11467"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11468"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11469"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11470"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11496"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11497"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11498"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11499"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11500"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11501"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11502"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11503"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11504"/> <ROW oi_personal_emp="11505"/> </ROWS> </DATOS>
qry:define.name: PIPEINICIALIZAR

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT COUNT(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq) AS cant FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
